author: newjordan
name: Donnie_TTT
technique_summary: Donnie (11L Raphe-recipe + layer-loops, sp4096 + brotli+bshf + mixed-int) + score-first TTT (PR #1493 precedent). After baseline artifact-sliding eval, eval_val_ttt scores each 32k-token chunk under no_grad, then SGD-trains on it (lr=0.005 cosine, momentum=0.9, 3 epochs). eval_model.looping_active=True throughout post-quant evals.
pending: val_bpb and artifact_bytes null until 8xH100 run lands. Expected order of runs: Mikey_TTT 3-seed → Donnie_TTT 3-seed.
